pages.name: Home
pages.description: Entry point for the llama farm agritourism site highlighting key activities, stays, shop items, and quick access to main sections.
primary_functions: Introduce the farm, core experiences, and value proposition
Provide quick links to tours, lodging, parties, field trips, shop, and gift cards
Highlight featured tours, workshops, stays, and special offers
Guide users to key tools such as the itinerary builder and gift card purchase

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click ��Tours & Activities�� in main navigation or on a featured tours section CTA
Click ��Workshops & Classes�� in main navigation or featured workshop card
Click ��Lodging & Stays�� in main navigation or lodging highlight
Click �00Llama Birthday Parties�00 or �00Parties & Events�00 teaser
Click a field trips or school groups highlight
Click �00Farm Shop�00 in main navigation or featured product
Click �00Plan Your Visit�00 or �00Build a Weekend Itinerary�00 CTA
Click �00Gift Cards�00 in main navigation or gift card promotion
Click an �00About the Farm�00 teaser in homepage content

access_methods.description: Access via �00Home�00 link in main navigation
Default landing page when visiting the root site URL

pages.name: Tours & Activities List
pages.description: Browseable list of all tours and on-farm activities for individuals and families.
primary_functions: List available tours and activities such as Family Llama Farm Tour and Llama Walk
Filter tours by type, audience (family-friendly), time of day, and price
Show key details like duration, starting price, and next available dates
Link to individual tour detail pages for full information and booking

incoming_params.description: Optional ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD) to pre-filter activities for a specific day.
Optional activity type filter such as �00tour�00 or �00walk�00.
Optional audience filter, e.g., �00family_friendly�00 or �00all_ages�00.
Optional time-of-day filter such as �00morning�00, �00afternoon�00, or �00evening�00.
Optional maximum adult price filter used to find affordable tours.
Optional maximum child price filter used to find affordable tours.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a tour/activity card such as �00Family Llama Farm Tour�00.
Click �00Add to Itinerary�00 or �00Plan this day�00 from a date-focused view.

access_methods.description: Access via �00Tours & Activities�00 in main navigation.
Access with optional query parameters for pre-filtered results (e.g., ?date=2024-07-15&time_of_day=morning).

pages.name: Tour / Activity Detail
pages.description: Detail and booking page for a specific tour or activity (e.g., Family Llama Farm Tour, Llama Walk).
primary_functions: Display full description, photos, schedule, and requirements for a single tour or activity
Allow users to select date via a date picker and choose available time slots
Let users set participant quantities by type (adults, children) and view dynamic total pricing
Offer add-ons such as picnic baskets and show their effect on the total price
Provide a clear call to action to add the configured tour to the cart or continue to checkout

incoming_params.description: ID of the tour/activity to display (e.g., the Family Llama Farm Tour).
Optional pre-selected date (YYYY-MM-DD) for which to load sessions.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click the primary CTA such as �00Add to Cart�00 or �00Continue to Checkout�00 after configuring participants and add-ons.

access_methods.description: Access via links from tour listings or featured experiences using ?activityId=.

pages.name: Workshops & Classes List
pages.description: Listing page for educational experiences such as fiber workshops and spinning classes.
primary_functions: List all available workshops and classes including beginner-level llama fiber workshops
Filter workshops by skill level, topic (fiber, animal care), date, and price
Highlight beginner-friendly options suitable for first-time spinners
Link to individual workshop detail pages for date selection and registration

incoming_params.description: Optional workshop topic filter such as �00fiber�00 or �00animal_care�00.
Optional skill level filter such as �00beginner�00.
Optional maximum price to filter affordable workshops.
Optional date (YYYY-MM-DD) to show workshops on a specific day.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click the workshop title or card such as �00Beginner Spinning with Llama Fiber�00.

access_methods.description: Access via �00Workshops & Classes�00 in main navigation.
Access with optional filters in query parameters (e.g., ?topic=fiber&skill_level=beginner).

pages.name: Workshop Detail
pages.description: Booking and registration page for a specific workshop or class.
primary_functions: Show detailed workshop information including objectives, instructor, duration, and prerequisites
Allow users to choose the earliest or preferred available date and time
Let users select number of attendees and see the calculated total price
Provide a promo code field (e.g., LLAMA10) and update pricing after applying discounts
Enable users to register or add the workshop booking to the cart

incoming_params.description: ID of the workshop to display.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click �00Register�00, �00Book Now�00, or �00Add to Cart�00 after selecting a session, attendee count, and promo code.

access_methods.description: Accessed from the workshops list or featured workshops using ?workshopId=.

pages.name: Lodging & Stays Overview
pages.description: Overview of all on-farm lodging options such as cabins and farm stays.
primary_functions: List all accommodations including the Llama View Cabin
Provide high-level details like occupancy, base nightly rate, and key amenities
Allow users to filter stays by dates, capacity, and features (e.g., breakfast included)
Link to individual lodging detail pages for full information and booking

incoming_params.description: Optional desired check-in date (YYYY-MM-DD).
Optional desired check-out date (YYYY-MM-DD).
Optional number of adult guests used to pre-filter suitable properties.
Optional number of child guests used to pre-filter suitable properties.
Optional flag indicating that only breakfast-inclusive options should be shown.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on an accommodation card such as �00Llama View Cabin�00.

access_methods.description: Access via �00Lodging & Stays�00 in main navigation.
Accessible with optional query parameters for pre-selected dates and guest counts.

pages.name: Lodging Detail
pages.description: Detail and booking page for a specific accommodation such as the Llama View Cabin.
primary_functions: Display detailed photos, description, amenities, and policies for the accommodation
Allow selection of check-in and check-out dates, including 2-night stays
Let users specify number of guests (adults and children) within occupancy limits
Offer and clearly label rate plans, including breakfast-inclusive options, with live pricing
Show total stay price before taxes and provide a button to reserve or add the stay to the cart

incoming_params.description: ID of the lodging property to display (e.g., Llama View Cabin).
Optional pre-selected check-in date (YYYY-MM-DD).
Optional pre-selected check-out date (YYYY-MM-DD).
Optional pre-selected number of adult guests.
Optional pre-selected number of child guests.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click �00Reserve�00, �00Book Now�00, or �00Continue�00 after choosing dates, guests, and a breakfast-inclusive rate.

access_methods.description: Access from the lodging overview or featured stay cards using ?lodgingId=.

pages.name: Parties & Groups Overview
pages.description: Landing page for private events, children�00s birthday parties, and group/school visits.
primary_functions: Present main group offerings such as Llama Birthday Parties and School Field Trips
Allow users to switch between sections like parties/events and groups/schools
Summarize what is included in each package and typical group sizes
Link to group package detail pages for configuration and inquiry submission

incoming_params.description: Determines which tab is active: �00parties�00 for birthdays & private events, or �00schools�00 for field trips.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a package card such as �00Llama Birthday Party�00 or �00School Field Trip�00.

access_methods.description: Access via �00Parties & Events�00 or �00Groups & Schools�00 links with appropriate section parameter.
Directly access a specific section using ?section=parties or ?section=schools.

pages.name: Group Package Detail & Inquiry
pages.description: Configuration and request page for a specific group package such as a birthday party or school field trip.
primary_functions: Show full package details tailored to the selected group type (birthday, school, etc.)
Allow users to choose a date (including specific months and weekdays/weekends) and time or duration
Let users set group size parameters (e.g., number of children, students, adults, chaperones)
Offer options such as indoor vs outdoor setups, educational focus, and add-ons like cupcake upgrades
Provide a request form (opened via Request Booking/Inquire button) to capture contact details and a custom message, and submit an inquiry or quote request

incoming_params.description: ID of the group package, e.g., �00llama_birthday_party�00 or �00school_field_trip�00.
Optional pre-selected requested date (YYYY-MM-DD) for the event.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Stay on the same page and show a success message after �00Request Booking�00 or �00Inquire Now�00 submits successfully.

access_methods.description: Access via package tiles on the Parties & Groups Overview or via footer deep links with ?packageId=.

pages.name: Farm Shop Listing
pages.description: Online store catalog for farm products, including llama wool clothing and accessories.
primary_functions: Display product categories such as Clothing & Accessories and subcategories like Socks
Provide filters for price (including maximum price), rating, size, and other attributes
Allow users to browse and compare products (e.g., llama wool socks) that meet selected criteria
Link to individual product detail pages for more information and purchase

incoming_params.description: Category identifier or slug, e.g., �00all_products�00, �00clothing_accessories�00, or �00socks�00.
Optional search term to filter products by keyword.
Optional maximum price filter (e.g., 25 for socks under $25).
Optional minimum average rating filter (e.g., 4.0).
Optional size filter such as �00medium�00 for wearable products.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a product card (e.g., a pair of llama wool socks) from the listing.

access_methods.description: Access via �00Farm Shop�00 in main navigation.
Access via �00Farm Shop�00 link in the footer.
Access with category and filter parameters (e.g., ?categoryId=socks&max_price=25&min_rating=4).

pages.name: Product Detail
pages.description: Detailed view and purchase page for a single retail product.
primary_functions: Show detailed product information including images, description, price, and customer rating
Offer options such as size, color, and other variants (e.g., Medium sock size)
Allow users to set quantity and add the product to the cart
Indicate availability and any relevant care or shipping information

incoming_params.description: Product ID whose details should be displayed.
Optional variant ID (e.g., pre-select size Medium).

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click �00Add to Cart�00 after selecting desired options and quantity.

access_methods.description: Access from the shop listing or featured products using ?id=PRODUCT_ID.

pages.name: Itinerary Builder / Plan Your Visit
pages.description: Interactive tool to build a multi-day visit with tours, walks, and workshops.
primary_functions: Allow users to select a start and end date (e.g., a Saturday and following Sunday)
Display available activities per day, including farm tours, llama walks, and fiber workshops
Enable users to choose times and participant counts for each selected activity
Add chosen activities to a unified weekend itinerary with a summary of schedule and costs
Provide an option to save the itinerary into the cart or proceed toward booking all selected items together

incoming_params.description: Optional itinerary start date (YYYY-MM-DD), usually a Saturday for weekend planning.
Optional itinerary end date (YYYY-MM-DD), usually the following Sunday.
Optional label for the itinerary (e.g., �00Llama Weekend Getaway�00).

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click �00Add Itinerary to Cart�00 after adding all desired sessions.
Click a link to view more tour options for a specific day.
Click a link to view more workshops for a specific day.

access_methods.description: Access via �00Plan Your Visit�00 in main navigation.
Access with optional start and end dates in query parameters.

pages.name: Gift Cards
pages.description: Purchase page for physical and digital gift cards, including llama-themed designs and scheduled delivery.
primary_functions: Let users choose between digital and physical gift card options
Allow entry or selection of gift card amounts, including a $75 option
Offer multiple card designs, including clearly llama-themed artwork, for selection
Collect recipient details and a custom message, and allow scheduling of email delivery on a future date
Provide a button to add the configured gift card to the cart or proceed directly to checkout

incoming_params.description: Optional gift card type preset, e.g., �00digital�00 or �00physical�00.
Optional pre-set gift card amount such as 75.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click �00Add to Cart�00 or �00Proceed to Checkout�00 after configuring the gift card.

access_methods.description: Access via �00Gift Cards�00 in main navigation.
Access via �00Gift Cards�00 link in the footer.
Access with optional type and amount presets in the URL.

pages.name: Cart / Booking Summary
pages.description: Unified cart summarizing tours, workshops, lodging, gift cards, and shop products prior to checkout.
primary_functions: Display all items added from tours, workshops, lodging, parties, gift cards, and the shop with key details
Allow users to review dates, times, quantities, and options for each item
Enable users to adjust quantities or remove items before purchase
Show subtotals and overall total pricing and indicate any applied discounts
Provide a clear path to proceed to checkout

incoming_params.description: Optional cart item ID to visually highlight after adding an item.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click �00Proceed to Checkout�00 or equivalent primary button.

access_methods.description: Access via a cart/booking summary icon or button shown sitewide.
Access when redirected here after adding an item to the cart.

pages.name: Checkout
pages.description: Final step for confirming bookings and purchases and entering payment details.
primary_functions: Summarize all cart items including tours, stays, workshops, products, and gift cards
Collect purchaser contact information and billing details
Capture payment information securely and handle any additional notes or requests
Provide final confirmation of total cost before placing the order or booking

outgoing_connections.trigger: Remain on the page and show an order confirmation state after a successful �00Place Order�00 action.

access_methods.description: Access after submitting the cart page via �00Proceed to Checkout�00.

pages.name: About the Farm
pages.description: Background information about the llama farm, mission, and team.
primary_functions: Describe the farm�00s history, mission, and approach to animal care
Introduce the team and their experience with llamas and agritourism
Reassure visitors about safety, welfare standards, and educational goals

access_methods.description: Access via the �00About the Farm�00 footer link.
May be linked from the homepage or other informational pages.

pages.name: Contact & Directions
pages.description: Contact information and directions for reaching the llama farm.
primary_functions: Provide address, map, driving directions, and basic operating hours
List phone numbers and email addresses for general inquiries and group bookings
Offer a simple contact form for questions not covered by specific package forms

incoming_params.description: Optional subject line preset for the contact form (e.g., �00Question about field trips�00).

outgoing_connections.trigger: Stay on page and show success message after submitting the general contact form.

access_methods.description: Access via �00Contact & Directions�00 in the footer.
May be linked from other pages when users need directions or contact details.

pages.name: FAQ & Policies
pages.description: Frequently asked questions and key policies for visits, bookings, and cancellations.
primary_functions: Answer common visitor questions about tours, workshops, lodging, and group visits
Explain booking, refund, and rescheduling policies for activities and stays
Outline safety rules, age requirements, and accessibility information
Provide links or references to any detailed terms and conditions

incoming_params.description: Optional FAQ section to focus on, such as �00tours�00, �00lodging�00, or �00groups�00.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click �00Still have questions?�00 link to contact form when FAQ doesn�00t answer a query.
